title: CompanyPeopleRegistry
description: Company-wide people registry kept in the main repository (root users.json). Presence in 'users' means the person is CURRENTLY ACTIVE and cooperating with the company — when the cooperation ends the record is removed (archived), not flagged. Same master-data shape as the delivery-project shared registry (people-registry.schema.json) plus 'relation' describing how the person relates to the company. Scope is firm-wide (statutory bodies, shareholders, employees, advisors, suppliers), independent of any delivery project. This is a SEPARATE registry from the delivery-project one: project layers 2/3 ref the delivery-project registry (projects/users.json), NOT this file. A person who is both an active cooperator and on a delivery project is listed in both, keyed by the same id.

comment.description: Free-form explanation of the file's purpose — presence = active cooperation, and the add / remove rules.

users.description: People who currently actively cooperate with the company. Presence here is the active-cooperation signal; remove the entry when cooperation ends.

id.description: Unique person identifier — typically the e-mail, or a 'jmeno.prijmeni' slug. The same id is reused for this person in the delivery-project registry when they also appear there.

title.description: Company position at their employer (e.g. 'CTO'); independent of the relation to our company.

employer.description: Optional employer / organization. Use the company's own name for internal staff; omit for statutory bodies / shareholders with no relevant employer.

relation.description: How the person relates to the company — one or more roles at once (e.g. a person may be both 'jednatel' and 'společník'). Values: e.g. 'jednatel', 'společník', 'zaměstnanec', 'dodavatel', 'poradce', 'účetní', 'advokát'.

website.description: Website URL of the person or their practice/organization.

barId.description: Bar association registration number, for lawyers (in CZ: ev. č. ČAK).

registrationId.description: Business registration number of the person's practice / organization (in CZ: IČO).

bankAccount.description: Bank account number for invoicing / payments.

note.description: Free-form context — scope of cooperation, who delegates to whom, etc.

represents.description: Standing representations: people this person is authorized to represent — e.g. on the basis of a power of attorney (plná moc), or as the designated common representative of a joint share (společný zástupce společného podílu). This is a STANDING arrangement, not a one-off representation at a single meeting.

ref.description: id of the represented person in this registry.

as.description: Capacity in which they are represented (e.g. 'společník').

basis.description: Legal basis of the representation (e.g. 'plná moc').

createdAt.description: When the record was created (ISO 8601 with timezone).
